name: wp-file-manager
description: Plugin de Wordpress para subir, eliminar o remplazar archivos.

scripts.sync:version: npm run sync:package && npm run sync:readme
scripts.push-tag: npm run sync:version && VERSION=$(npm run -s v) && git add . && git commit -m "Release $VERSION" && git tag $VERSION && git push origin master && git push origin $VERSION
scripts.rm-post: npm run rm-composer-lock && npm run rm-gitignore && npm run rm-autoload && npm run rm-composer && npm run rm-composer-json && npm run rm-package-json && npm run rm-README
scripts.update: npm run rm-vendor && npm run install
scripts.install: composer install --no-dev --optimize-autoloader && npm run rm-post && npm run mv-post

author: franciscoblancojn
